programmes.show_description: Clár speisialta do Lá Fhéile Pádraig: Téann Cathy Jordan ar an Joanie Madden Folk 'N' Irish Cruise. (Cathy Jordan joins the Joanie Madden Folk 'N' Irish Cruise.)
Tá Sam Amidon agus Siobhán Peoples ar aon intinn gurb amhlaidh seisiúin bhreátha cheoil agus comhrá maith. (For Sam Amidon and Siobhán Peoples a music session is like great conversation.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Táthar sa tóir ar an teaghlach is cumasaí in Éirinn. Á chur i láthair ag Síomha Ní Ruairc. (The search for Ireland's most talented family continues. Hosted by Síomha Ní Ruairc.)
Rachaidh beirt bhan tí in iomaíocht lena chéile chun béile a réiteach do sheisear Gaeilgeoirí. (Bernadette Ní Chadhain takes on Orla Ní Threasaigh in this programme.)
Sa chlár seo, cloisfimid dearcthaí éagsúla faoi fhrithghiniúint. (In episode 4 we hear various opinions about contraception.)
Is í Treasa McClafferty as Toraigh a bheidh ar chlár na seachtaine seo. Tory Island native Teresa McClafferty sings her favourite songs.
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tá gadaí faoin tsráid! Tá balún Rocco ar iarraidh. (There's a thief in the underground world. Rocco's Balloon has disappeared.)
Is é lá breithe an Mheicneoir Glas atá ann agus tá fuadar faoi Vicky an Trucail Uachtar Reoite inniu. (It's Green Mechanical's birthday and Vicky is very fast today.)
Tagann Eibhlín an Trucail Uachtar Reoite isteach mar mhúinteoir ionaid fad a bhíonn Bn. Uí Mhótair as láthair. (Eileen Ice Cream Truck fills in while Ms. Motors is away.)
Caithfidh Pip agus Streak aire a thabhairt do choileáin Barkley inniu. (On today's programme Pip and Streak are puppy sitting for Barkley.)
Tá an foirgneamh nua le n-oscailt & caithfidh ár gcairde an sféar a chur ar a bharr. (It's the opening day of the skyscraper and the Mechas need to put the sphere on top.)
Déantar bó ollmhór de Mhoobert. Ach cá gcuirfear Moobert nuair a thosaíonn stoirm bháistí? (The Mechas need to build a shelter big enough to fit Moobert.)
Níl ag Catboy ach é féin chun an ceann is fearr a fháil ar Romeo. (Robot made a costume for Romeo, who steals Catboy's powers as well.)
Briseann an teilifís le linn an chláir is fearr le Finny agus le Muireann. (The TV breaks during Finny and Myrtle's favourite show, they make up what happens next.)
Déanann damhsa an lae inniu sárimreoirí cispheile de Chaitríona agus Roy. (Caitríona and Roy are brilliant basketball players after learning today's dance.)
Déanann Ricky a dhícheall cúnamh a thabhairt do chuile dhuine chun féirín a fháil. (Today, Ricky tries to help everyone, so that he will receive a gift!)
Bíonn an-spraoi ag Ricky ag Féile na nEarraí Caillte. (Today, the Festival of Lost Things is keeping Ricky busy.)
Tá peata nua faighte ag Ricky agus Tyra. (Today, Ricky and Tyra find a new pet in the park.)
Téann Harmony, Melody agus Bop ag sléibhteoireacht. (Harmony, Melody and Bop are walking up a mountain.)
Téann na Singalings ar safari! Beidh neart ainmhithe le feiceáil. (The Singalings are on safari! There's plenty of animals to see.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Déanann Peg agus Cat cáca do bhreithlá dhuine de na déagóirí. (Peg and Cat make a birthday cake for one of the teens today.)
Bíonn Sailí agus Nic ag spraoi sa teachín sa gcrann nuair a ghlaonn máthair Nic orthu don lón. (Sally and Nick are playing up in their tree house.)
Is maith le Nic agus Sailí a bheith ag dul i bhfolach ach níl Sailí go maith ag an gcluiche seo. (Nick and Sally are playing hide-and-seek but Sally keeps getting found.)
Tá Sailí ag iarraidh uisce a chur ar na plandaí ach níl sé te ná grianmhar taobh amuigh. (Sally wants to water the plants in her backyard but it's not hot and sunny outside.)
Tá an geansaí is fearr le Nic róbheag aige ach níl sé ag iarraidh é a chaitheamh amach. (Nick has grown out of his favourite sweater but he doesn't want to part with it.)
Tá Zak cinnte go bhfuil cumhacht speisialta aige féin ó bhreathnaigh sé ar an gclár 'An Saol Rúnda'. (Zak is convinced that his mind has special powers.)
Tá a fhios ag Zak go díreach céard atá uaidh dá bhreithlá - an róbó is déanaí; An Scriosúnach Damanta. (Zak knows exactly what he wants as a birthday present.)
Fuadaítear Pierce agus caithfidh Polly agus a mhuintir oibriú as lámha a chéile chun é a shábháil. (Pierce is kidnapped and Polly must join forces with his parents to save him.)
Tá domhain nua aimsithe ag Polly, Pierce agus Jake agus is áit iontach é le dul ag scátáil! (Polly, Pierce, and Jake discover a new pocket dimension: Skatesville!)
Faigheann Dónall amach go bhfuil an-spraoi ag baint le slaitín draíochta! (Dónall is about to find out what can happen in the presence of a magic wand.)
Insíonn Daideo cén fáth a mhaireann moncaithe i gcrainn. (Daideo tells the story of why monkeys live in trees.)
Buaicphointí CLG ó shraitheanna Allianz chomh maith le buaicphointí liathróid láimhe. (GAA action from the Allianz  leagues and handball highlights.)
Tá cuid de na hiarrthóirí ag súil go mbeidh siad in ann tuilleadh rís a fháil. (In a Survivor first, castaways attempt a negotiation for rice.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Craoladh beo ar an gcluiche idir Shamrock Rovers agus Peamount United i bPríomhroinn na mBan. (Live coverage of Shamrock Rovers v Peamount United in the Women's Premier Division.)
Craoladh beo ar an gcluiche idir na Sharks agus Cúige Mumhan sa gCraobh Rugbaí Aontaithe. (Live coverage of the Sharks v Munster in the United Rugby Championship.)
Craoladh beo ar chluiche ó bhabhta 6 de Shraith Lidl. Á chur i láthair ag Máire Ní Bhraonáin. (Live coverage of a match in round 6 in the Lidl League.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Craoladh beo ar na cluichí ar fad i mbabhta 7 de Shraith Iomána Allianz Roinn 1A. (Live coverage of all the games in round 7 of the Allianz Hurling League Division 1A.)
Tugtar léargas ar na pobail i sé cheantar i nGaeltacht Mhúscraí i gContae Chorcaí sa tsraith seo. (In this series we get an insight into the communities of the Múscraí Gaeltacht.)
Caithfidh fear díolacháin aire a thabhairt dá mhac. (A struggling salesman takes custody of his son.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Tabharfaidh Hector faoi thuras ina chuaifeach ar fud na hÉireann ag casadh le daoine éagsúla. (Hector takes us on a whirlwind tour of Ireland meeting people from all over the World.)
Tagann casadh eile sa scéal díreach nuair a shíleann na himscrúdaitheoirí go bhfuil a fhios acu cé atá ciontach. (The investigators think they've found their culprit.)
Súil siar sa ar agallaimh, ar thaibhléirithe agus ar ghearrscannáin ón tsraith Imeall. (A look back at interviews, performances, and short film pieces from the series Imeall.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Beidh Breanndán Ó Beaglaoich ag bothántaíocht i measc ghlúin na gCaipíní i bparóiste an Fheirtéaraigh. (Breanndán Ó Beaglaoich talks to people from Baile an Fheirtéaraigh, Kerry.)
Tugann Doireann Ní Ghlacáin aghaidh ar an Oirthear na Gaillimhe ag bualadh le ceoltóirí na háite. (Doireann Ní Ghlacáin travels around East Galway, meeting local musicians.)
Clár é seo a rinneadh i 2008 mar cheiliúradh a dhéanamh ar dheich mbliana Ghradam Ceoil TG4. (This programme was recorded to celebrate 10 years of Gradam Ceoil TG4.)
Tá Conall agus Mairéad ar a sáimhín só ceart ar Oileán Tenerife. (This week Mairéad and Conall are on the sunny Island of Tenerife at Manantial De Tara.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Bíonn ríméad ar Ribín nuair a fhaigheann sí fáinne draíochta. (Ribín is delighted when she is given a magic ring.)
Tá Gecko tinn agus caithfidh na meicneoirí eile an obair a dhéanamh. (The other mechanics must cover for Gecko when he's sick.)
Bíonn Cory ag iarraidh bacóir a fháil ach is léir go mbíonn adharca fada ar na ba thar lear. (Cory wants to get a spoiler, but he figures out that a spoiler isn't all that.)
Tá gach duine le ní i gClós na mBalún ach ní maith le Tuck é féin a ní. (It's bath day in Balloon Barnyard, but Tuck doesn't like baths.)
Nuair a fhuadaíonn eitleog Nat, caithfidh Timmy agus an criú ceann eile a dhéanamh. (After Ranger Nat's kite blows away, the Mechas and Timmy learn to build their own.)
Má tá an droichead briste cén chaoi a rachaidh an traein trasna na hailte? (The train needs to cross the ravine but the bridge is broken.)
Ní maith le Gekko na bobghaistí atá ar bharr Chnoc Mistéire mar sin fanann sé ag bun an chnoic. (Gekko does not like being on top of Mystery Mountain.)
Tá daitheacha fiacaile ar Dheaide Siorc ach tugann Finny misneach dó. (When Papa Shark has a toothache, Finny shows him how to be brave.)
Ní maith le Igam Ogam an bronntanas a fuair sí ó Éinín. (Igam Ogam tries to get rid of an unwanted gift from Birdie.)
Féachann an chailleach an fhliúit draíochta a aimsiú chun smacht a fháil ar an domhan. (An Chailleach attempts to find the magical flute in order to control the world.)
Déanann an Chailleach cailín beag atá déanta as cáca. (An Chailleach accidentally creates a little girl made of cake.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tá an scoil ar fad ag spraoi le húlahúpanna ach tá Lola tinn de. (The whole school is hula hooping, and Lola has had enough.)
Téann Charlie agus Lola ag spraoi sa ngairdín. (Charlie and Lola go exploring in the garden.)
Cé gur iarr Lola ar Mhamó agus Daideo scútar a fháil di, is scátaí oighir atá uaithi i ndáiríre. (Having begged Granny and Granddad for a scooter, Lola really wants ice skates.)
Deir Lola lena cara go rachaidh sí ag spraoi léi ach ansin tugann Marv cuireadh chuig cóisir di. (Lola promises to play with her friend, but then Marv invites her to his party.)
Tá rún ag Lola agus Lotta airgead a bhailiú chun cabhrú le panda. (Lola and Lotta are adopting a panda and decide to raise money for it.)
Tá Zak ag iarraidh curiarracht dhomhanda a shárú. (After finding a Book of School Records, Zak attempts to break a record.)
Ligeann Zak air féin go bhfuil leathchúpla aige darb ainm Zeke. (Zak pretends that he has a twin brother named Zeke!)
Achoimre ar chuid de mhórscéalta na seachtaine mar a craoladh ar Nuacht TG4. (Some of the stories from this week's regional news as seen on Nuacht TG4.)
Caithfidh gach duine tearmann a ghlacadh i stáisiún teilifíse ón hairicín. (A police evacuation during a hurricane forces everyone to take refuge at the TV station.)
Tugann Rose bata agus bóthar don suarachán Miles. (Rose gives the boot to penny-pinching Miles.)
Bíonn neart le feiceáil ar an ráschúrsa ag Seó Chluain Meala i dTiobraid Árainn. (The racecourse is busy at the historic Clonmel Show in Tipperary.)
Le teacht mhí Lúnasa tagann deireadh le séasúr an tsamhraidh agus tá an chuid dheireanach den sadhlas á baint. (The last of the silage is being harvested.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Craoladh beo ar na cluichí ar fad i mbabhta 7 de Shraith Peile Allianz Roinn 2. (Live coverage of all the games in round 7 of the Allianz Football League Division 2.)
Craoladh beo ar na cluichí ar fad i mbabhta 7 de Shraith Peile Allianz Roinn 1. (Live coverage of all the games in round 7 of the Allianz Football League Division 1.)
Craoladh iarbheo ar na cluichí ar fad i mbabhta 7 de Shraith Peile Allianz Roinn 3. (Deferred coverage of all the games in round 7 of the Allianz Football League Division 3.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Tugann trí fhoireann aghaidh ar a chéile chun an pota óir a bhuachan. Seó cluichí á chur i láthair ag Eibhlín Ní Chonghaile. (Gameshow in which 3 teams compete to win the jackpot.)
Is iad Aoife Welby agus The Shan Vans a thabharfaidh faoin dúshlán sa gclár seo. (Aoife Welby and The Shan Vans swap songs for a musical challenge.)
Cailleann Micheál an cloigeann le Réailtín agus ní fhágann sé smid aici. (Micheál loses his patience with Réailtín and she is left speechless.)
Tugann Doireann Ní Ghlacáin aghaidh ar dheisceart Bhaile Átha Cliath sa gclár seo. (In this programme Doireann Ní Ghlacáin travels to South Dublin.)
Is sa Four Provinces i mBaile Átha Cliath a bheidh Pauline Scanlon sa gclár seo. (Pauline Scanlon visits The Four Provinces, Co. Dublin to hear a wealth of music.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
The Kilfenora Céilí Band a bheidh i mbun cainte le Dáithí Ó Sé sa chlár seo. (Dáithí Ó Sé meets The Kilfenora Céilí Band.)
